title: Threat Hunting Engine — Sigma Rule Executor & ATT&CK Hypothesis Scheduler
description: threat_hunter.py has 30+ MITRE ATT&CK hypotheses, IOC management, Sigma rule YAML parsing, kill chain visualization, and automated hunt triggers. test_threat_hunting_engine.py validates the FSM. Gap: Sigma rule execution evaluates rules against in-memory event lists rather than querying the actual SIEM event stream, and automated triggers are stored but never fired.
missing: Sigma rule executor against SIEM stream: implement SigmaEvaluator.evaluate_stream() that queries siem_integration_engine events and returns matched rule hits
Automated hunt trigger scheduler: cron job that checks trigger conditions (new CVE match, IOC ingested, network pattern) every 5 minutes and starts a hunt workflow automatically
ATT&CK coverage heatmap API: /api/v1/threat-hunting/coverage that returns a MITRE ATT&CK matrix with tested/untested technique coverage per org
